qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Hardcoded default JWT secret enables unauthenticated JWT forgery and full API access
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes shell command injection in the /api/user/git-config endpoint (server/routes/user.js:58-59). This finding describes a hardcoded JWT secret enabling authentication bypass, which is referenced as VULN-01 in the advisory but is not the primary vulnerability described in GHSA-7fv4-fmmc-86g2.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unsanitized WebSocket shell parameters enable OS command injection through sessionId and projectPath
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes command injection via the /api/user/git-config endpoint (server/routes/user.js:58-59) interpolating gitName/gitEmail into git config commands. This finding describes command injection via the WebSocket /shell endpoint (server/index.js:1704,1782) interpolating projectPath/sessionId into bash commands. Different endpoint, different vulnerable code location, different injection vector.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-7fv4-fmmc-86g2) describes shell command injection in the /api/user/git-config endpoint, where gitName and gitEmail are interpolated into git config --global commands at server/routes/user.js:58-59. None of the qualifying findings identify this specific vulnerable code/root cause. The hardcoded_jwt_secret_auth_bypass finding matches VULN-01 referenced in the advisory but is not the primary vulnerability described by GHSA-7fv4-fmmc-86g2. The websocket_shell_cmd_injection finding describes a different command injection vector (WebSocket /shell endpoint at server/index.js:1704/1782).
evidence: Advisory specifies vulnerable code location: server/routes/user.js lines 58-59
Advisory root cause: interpolation of gitName and gitEmail into git config --global commands with insufficient escaping
hardcoded_jwt_secret_auth_bypass: different vulnerability (authentication bypass via hardcoded JWT secret)
websocket_shell_cmd_injection: different endpoint (/shell WebSocket), different code location (server/index.js:1704,1782), different injection vector (projectPath/sessionId)
